title: Thai Spicy Chicken Salad
description: A refreshing and spicy salad made with chicken, Thai ingredients, and mixed greens.

ingredients.name: mixed greens
ingredients.notes: such as arugula, spinach, and lettuce

ingredients.name: salad dressing
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or soy sauce

instructions: 1. In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add the Thai red chili peppers and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
5. Add the fish sauce, lime juice, and salad dressing to the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Add the mixed greens to the skillet and toss to combine with the dressing.
7. Slice the cooked chicken into thin strips and add to the skillet.
8. Top the salad with toasted peanuts and cilantro.
9. Serve immediately and adjust seasoning as needed.
